title: ROPE validation check kind: rmse_timeseries
description: Fields of a check object (besides id/kind) when kind == 'rmse_timeseries'. Forecasts [start, end] and computes RMSE against a truth CSV over that window. truth_csv is a plain path (resolved relative to the suite JSON's own directory) — this kind owns its own truth-data reference, there is no shared data_refs indirection.

truth_csv.description: Path to a CSV with datetime,lst,lat,alt_km,density[,uncertainty] columns, relative to the suite JSON's directory.

threshold.description: Optional pass/fail bound(s) on the computed RMSE. Evaluated by the check function itself, not by this schema.
